action.reasoning: Observation: v14 heuristic yields very low safe_steps (~1-8 avg, max 8<<500), detector~9-25 steps/ep, avg_dist~2-5m but success=0; test shows improved config inspection but per-epi avg_dist print bug (0.00); files truncated in workspace causing incomplete policy. Earlier versions hit ~50-100 safe_steps. Analysis: detector-prioritized follow too rare (low detector usage), gains cause oscillation or poor human-speed matching (~0.25-0.35m/s), OA interferes with human (depth sees humanoid), myopic reactive loses dynamic target often; manual safe count + metrics extraction buggy. Root cause: unstable follow mode + extraction errors. Literature confirms heuristic can reach ~0.5 follow-rate with tuning. Decision: rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py with clean shorter v15 HeuristicPolicy (detector>0.4 triggers stable low-speed follow with gentler -4*angle + 0.25 base vel, refined depth patches/valid>0.01, reduced OA sensitivity, better deadzones, manual safe count using success_angle+dist in loop, fixed social_nav_stats extraction for avg_dist, full per-epi JSON with all required keys). Update train.py to v15. Run test_full_episode.py to validate higher safe_steps/detector before submit_eval on predict.py (dummy ckpt).
